search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopclientsbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename name as "Name", network.name as "Network Name", usage.percentage as usage_percentage, usage.total as total_usage, usage.upstream as usage_upstream, usage.downstream as usage_downstream | eval "Usage Percentage"=round(usage_percentage,2) | eval "Total Usage (MB)"=round(total_usage,2) | eval "Usage Upstream (MB)"=round(usage_upstream,2) | eval "Usage Downstream (MB)"=round(usage_downstream,2) | table "Name", "Network Name", "Usage Percentage", "Total Usage (MB)", "Usage Upstream (MB)", "Usage Downstream (MB)" | sort 10 - "Usage Percentage"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopclientsbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename usage.percentage as usage_percentage , usage.total as usage_total, usage.upstream as usage_upstream, usage.downstream as usage_downstream | eval usagePercentage=round(usage_percentage,2) | eval usageTotal=round(usage_total,2) | eval usageUpstream=round(usage_upstream,2) | eval usageDownstream=round(usage_downstream,2) | search name="$row.Name$" network.name="$row.Network Name$" usagePercentage="$row.Usage Percentage$" usageTotal="$row.Total Usage (MB)$" usageUpstream="$row.Usage Upstream (MB)$" usageDownstream="$row.Usage Downstream (MB)$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopclientsbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename network.name as "Network Name" | stats sum(usage.total) as "Total Usage" by "Network Name" | sort - "Total Usage"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopclientsbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename name as "Client Name" | stats values(usage.upstream) as "Usage Upstream", values(usage.downstream) as "Usage Downstream", values(usage.percentage) as "Usage Percentage" by "Client Name" | sort - "Usage Percentage"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopclientsbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename usage.upstream as "Usage Upstream", usage.downstream as "Usage Downstream", usage.percentage as "Usage Percentage" | search "$click.name2$"="$click.value2$" &earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
